ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename of the experimental data */,
  "header_row" INTEGER /* Row number of the header in the data file */,
  "data_label" TEXT /* Label for the data being plotted */,
  "plot_title" TEXT /* Title of the plot generated from the experiment */,
  "plot_subtitle" TEXT /* Subtitle of the plot generated from the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "setup_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experimental setup used */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment this data point belongs to */,
  "x_value" REAL /* X value of the data point */,
  "y_value" REAL /* Y value of the data point */,
  "data_markevery" INTEGER /* Interval for marking data points in plots */,
  "error_absolute" REAL /* Absolute error associated with the data point */,
  "error_relative" REAL /* Relative error associated with the data point */,
  "z_value" REAL /* Z value of the data point (for 3D data) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data point was recorded */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data point (e.g., sensor, simulation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markers" (
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marker style */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment associated with this marker */,
  "marker_style" TEXT /* Style of the marker used in plots */,
  "marker_edge_color" TEXT /* Edge color of the marker */,
  "marker_size" INTEGER /* Size of the marker */,
  "marker_fill_color" TEXT /* Fill color of the marker */,
  "marker_edge_width" REAL /* Width of the marker edge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_markers_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison dataset */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment this comparison belongs to */,
  "cmp_filename" TEXT /* Filename of the comparison dataset */,
  "cmp_header_row" INTEGER /* Row number of the header in the comparison data file */,
  "cmp_x_col_name" TEXT /* X coordinate column name in the comparison dataset */,
  "cmp_y_col_name" TEXT /* Y coordinate column name in the comparison dataset */,
  "cmp_data_markevery" INTEGER /* Interval for marking data points in comparison plots */,
  "cmp_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the comparison dataset */,
  "cmp_date" TEXT /* Date when the comparison dataset was created */,
  "cmp_status" TEXT /* Status of the comparison (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_markers" (
  "comparison_marker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison marker style */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the comparison dataset this marker belongs to */,
  "cmp_marker_style" TEXT /* Style of the marker used in comparison plots */,
  "cmp_marker_fill_color" TEXT /* Fill color of the marker used in the comparison dataset */,
  "cmp_marker_edge_color" TEXT /* Edge color of the marker used in the comparison dataset */,
  "cmp_marker_edge_width" REAL /* Width of the marker edge in comparison plots */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_marker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_markers_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_lines" (
  "comparison_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison line style */,
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the comparison dataset this line belongs to */,
  "cmp_line_style" TEXT /* Style of the line used in comparison plots */,
  "cmp_line_color" TEXT /* Color of the line used in comparison plots */,
  "cmp_line_width" REAL /* Width of the line used in comparison plots */,
  "cmp_line_dash_pattern" TEXT /* Dash pattern for the line in comparison plots */,
  "cmp_line_capstyle" TEXT /* Cap style for the line ends in comparison plots */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_lines_comparison_id FOREIGN KEY ("comparison_id") REFERENCES comparisons ("comparison_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plots" (
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plot */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment associated with the plot settings */,
  "x_label" TEXT /* Label for the x-axis */,
  "y_label" TEXT /* Label for the y-axis */,
  "x_min" REAL /* Minimum value for the x-axis */,
  "x_max" REAL /* Maximum value for the x-axis */,
  "x_tick" REAL /* Tick interval for the x-axis */,
  "y_min" REAL /* Minimum value for the y-axis */,
  "y_max" REAL /* Maximum value for the y-axis */,
  "y_tick" REAL /* Tick interval for the y-axis */,
  "show_legend" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether to show the legend */,
  "legend_location" TEXT /* Position of the legend in the plot */,
  "plot_type" TEXT /* Type of plot (e.g., line, scatter, bar) */,
  "plot_color_scheme" TEXT /* Color scheme used for the plot */,
  "plot_aspect_ratio" REAL /* Aspect ratio of the plot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plots_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or group the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment associated with the report */,
  "report_filename" TEXT /* Filename of the generated report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed, comparative) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, reviewed, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_metrics" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment associated with the error metric */,
  "absolute_error" REAL /* Absolute error value for the experiment */,
  "relative_error" REAL /* Relative error value for the experiment */,
  "error_source" TEXT /* Source of the error (e.g., measurement, calculation) */,
  "error_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
